biography.value: A massive construct assembled from the bones of ancient Keepers, animated by Grafvitnir’s corrupted Root-Rune sorcery. Placed in the Emberwell to prevent any Keeper from completing the First Kindling rite. Twelve feet tall, built from hundreds of bones fused with black Rot-corruption. It guards the ember seed specifically. Its purpose is singular: prevent the ritual from completing.
biography.director:
ABILITIES

  • Grave Smash (Main, Melee, Might): T1 4 dmg; T2 8 dmg + target pushed 5ft; T3 12 dmg + pushed 10ft + knocked prone.
  • Rot Pulse (Main, Area 30ft, Reason, 2M): T1 3 necrotic; T2 5 necrotic + Intuition test or weakened EoNT; T3 7 necrotic + weakened EoNT all in range.
  • Keeper’s Bane (Main, Ranged 30ft, Presence): Targets Kaelen only. T1 3 dmg; T2 6 dmg + Presence test or ritual interrupted (she must spend her action next turn to restart); T3 8 dmg + ritual interrupted + frightened EoNT.

FEATURES

  • Root-Bound: Cannot move more than 60ft from the ember seed. If forced beyond that range, teleports back adjacent to seed at end of its turn.
  • Undying Purpose: Below 20 SP: +1 to attacks. Edge on Might defense tests vs. forced movement.
  • Constructed Resilience: Immune to poison and disease effects.

MALICE

  • Grafvitnir’s Decree (3M): Single target 40ft, Presence test: failure = 3d6 necrotic + frightened (save ends).

BEAT 19 TACTICS: Targets Kaelen above all others. Stays adjacent to ember seed. Will use Keeper’s Bane every turn it has an action. Grave Smash on anyone who gets adjacent. Rot Pulse when 3+ heroes cluster.
